completed_tasks.progress: Snapshot bookend taken (2026-05-18T20-15-56Z). Probe ran twice and failed fast both times on wrong REST routes (404). Probe is now route-fixed (d36c81c) and re-deployed to the VPS at ~/chat-spike-probe.mjs. NOT yet re-run with the corrected routes.

remaining_tasks.name: Re-run the route-fixed probe on live Countermoves and capture the JSON summary
Write 04-01-SPIKE-FINDINGS.md (D-01/OQ-1/OQ-2/OQ-3 verdicts + Phase 4 GO/NO-GO gate), add test/phases/04-01-spike-findings.test.mjs, create 04-01-SUMMARY.md

blockers.description: Task 2 is a checkpoint:human-action gate=blocking — only Eric can SSH into the live Countermoves production VPS and run the probe. An executor agent must not.

human_actions_pending.action: SSH to Countermoves, attach the 'spike' tmux session, re-run the route-fixed chat-spike-probe.mjs (~20-30 min), capture the output and scp it to .planning/phases/04-employee-chat/04-01-probe-output.txt
human_actions_pending.context: The probe proves the four load-bearing Phase 4 assumptions (D-01 native agent wake, OQ-1 attachment path, OQ-2 event payload, OQ-3 auto-reopen re-wake). Waves 2-6 are GATED on its GO verdict.

decisions.decision: Bookend the probe with a plain (unverified) snapshot, not a full restore-and-smoke verify.
decisions.rationale: The probe only creates deletable [SPIKE]-tagged issues/comments — no schema migration, install, or agent registration. A plain snapshot is a proportionate restorable safety net.

decisions.decision: Use the CEO agent (b2a22e50-d772-4b70-bb50-4f4e93c2e984) as the spike employee-agent.
decisions.rationale: The Countermoves roster has exactly two agents — CEO and the plugin-managed Editor-Agent. The CEO is the only non-Editor org-chart hire, which is what D-01 needs.

next_action: Run /gsd:resume-work, then have Eric re-run the route-fixed probe on the VPS. The exact run instructions are in .planning/phases/04-employee-chat/.continue-here.md.
context_notes: Phase 04 execute, Wave 1 of 6, plan 04-01 (falsify-first spike). 6 plans / 6 waves, fully sequential; only 04-01 is started. config: use_worktrees=false (sequential executor on main tree), auto_advance=true, executor=opus. Plan 04-01 Task 2 is the live-VPS human-action checkpoint. Today: built the probe, took the snapshot bookend, hit and fixed three snapshot-CLI gotchas (now in MemPalace clarity_pack/runbook + local memory countermoves-safety-cli-invocation.md), then discovered the probe's per-issue REST routes were wrong (company-scoped guess; real routes are flat /api/issues/{id}) and fixed them. The probe is re-deployed but not re-run. Tomorrow: re-run probe -> capture output -> spawn continuation agent for Task 3.
